Galactic Driver

A driving game that everyone can enjoy, from younger kids to adults looking for a pastime. Straight out of a science fiction setting, Galactic Driver comes with controls so easy, that you'll feel like a pro from the start. The level-based gameplay is designed to keep you engaged. The main goal is to drive your car through an obstacle course and reach the finish line before the car explodes.

Play Galactic Driver Online

Loading game...
About Galactic Driver

A driving game that everyone can enjoy, from younger kids to adults looking for a pastime. Straight out of a science fiction setting, Galactic Driver comes with controls so easy, that you'll feel like a pro from the start. The level-based gameplay is designed to keep you engaged. The main goal is to drive your car through an obstacle course and reach the finish line before the car explodes. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Galactic Driver in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Car game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Galactic Driver for free?

Yes. Galactic Driver is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Galactic Driver?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
